name: Big Deal
tagline: Icon theme ported directly from macOS Big Sur to iOS! Compatible with iPhone, iPad and iPod Touch. iOS 3.x or later. Apply using Anemone/Snowboard(On legacy devices, use WinterBoard instead).

name: 7venLock
tagline: iOS 7 Lock Screen sound effect for modern devices! Compatible with iPhone, iPad and iPod touch running iOS 10 - 14.8.1. Apply using SpringSounds. Depends: com.synnyg.springsounds
